calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Keep America Safe and Beautifull's unopposed Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 is granted and judgment shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the parties' [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Proposed order and proposed consent judgment emailed to the court.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
